part1.title: The gap made physical
part1.allocationQuestion: If you kept this ₹17,000 — where would it go?

part2.title: The ESOP upside
part2.question: What do you believe about this startup's future?

part3.title: The negotiation instinct
part3.question: Before you sign — what do you do?

options.text: Accept as is — grateful for the opportunity
options.response:
Most people don't negotiate.
Most companies expect you to.
Reasonable. Most startups have 10-15% flex on salary.

Bold. Shows you understand equity.
Founders respect this.

options.text: Ask for a joining bonus to cover Year 1 gap
options.response:
Smart. One-time cost for them.
Covers your Year 1 adjustment.

options.text: Counter on both salary and ESOPs
options.response: High confidence. Works if your skills are genuinely scarce.
